scripts.bridge:build: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$localDotnet = Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.dotnet\dotnet.exe'; if (Test-Path $localDotnet) { $dotnet = $localDotnet } else { $dotnet = 'dotnet' }; & $dotnet build 'packages/windows-bridge/PhoneToPcSpeaker.WindowsBridge/PhoneToPcSpeaker.WindowsBridge.csproj' --source '.\.nuget\packages'"
